item.dc:creator: MrMrsCrowley

item.title: HR is not your friend. Your employer is not your family.
item.description: https://www.theguardian.com/money/2024/apr/03/human-resources-hr-departments-us-workers Just a friendly reminder that the Human Resources (HR) department works for the company and the company’s interests and not you own. Management may want you to think that you’re all a “family”, but family members don’t limit your sick time. And HR might be made up of some very nice people, who have to follow thick policies approved by management and you likely had to sign an agreement saying you would follow all the policies. If you find yourself in a position where your instinct is telling you that this “isn’t right”. It’s time to reach out. Here’s are a few ways to do that which can help you. For full disclosure, I have not and do not work in Human Resources or in any area closely related to such. Just years of experience working the corporate treadmill.
item.dc:creator: halfabubbleoff

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
obviously
reasonable
that's a paddlin'
well it is pretty cringe
hersheys is best for smores, and thats about it
my god he's right
mmm hmm
counterpoint: no
that really is something
in my mind i'm always at Toyotathon
no thanks
it's about time
yeah!
ok
i thought this for so many years. tbh i still think it's the wrong one
::makes 'i don't know' sound::
that's my time. have a great night gang!!!

item.title: Best Blind Date Ever!
item.description: On May 24, Amanda Seyfried teamed up with The Dodo and Muddy Paws Rescue in NYC for a new installment of 'Dodo Dream Date.' On her blind date with a shelter dog, Amanda just might have fallen in love!

item.dc:creator: CrazyCatLacey

item.title: Calling all Nerds, Dorks, and Geeks
item.description:
If you haven't already watched X-Men 97, what are you waiting for? It's the best thing Marvel's put out in years
So originally this was supposed to be a Power Ranger dump but I had so many other dorky memes saved to my phone that I just threw the all together just to clear out my phones memory. So fair warning, about half of these are Power Ranger related
TMNT/MMPR comic crossover was one of the most fun graphic novels I've read in quite some time. Haven't read the sequel series yet but I'm hoping to get it from the library as soon as it's available
Luna Tax
item.dc:creator: DuncanHillsCoffee4Life

item.title: Memes vol 296
item.description:
I have a whole printing tray dedicated to them and also every flat surface in my room
I almost threw up on my orthodontist when they did this
Ok but hear me out on baby Audrey
I’ve been happy for some time now- but I think I’m considered mid gen z cuz I’m turning 20 this year
Asterion and Pasiphaë
I used to groom dogs and I can only imagine shaving a FUCKING RACCOON I love them but that’s gotta be a really hard task
The one with his hand up his nose ( ,,◕ ̫ ◕,, )
It’s like that scene from not another teen movie where he’s like “you have your mothers eyes” and it’s a stick figure
Tugger my beloved
Froggy, Liza Jane, and Scruffy tax
Nessie tax

item.title: Gladys Knight and The Pips_ Jack Black, Ben Stiller and Robert Downey Jr. - Happy 80th Birthday Gladys!
item.description:
Birth name: Gladys Maria Knight Born: May 28, 1944 (age 80) Atlanta, Georgia, U.S.
Photo Lester CohenGetty Images for NARAS
Gladys Knight arrives for the Recording Academy's Special Merit Awards Ceremony at the Wilshire Ebell Theatre in Los Angeles, California, on February 3, 2024. Michael Tran/AFP via Getty Images
Midnight Train To Georgia - Gladys Knight and The Pips on The Midnight Special March 8, 1974
item.dc:creator: tolson9

item.title: Images of Note: Rhombus
item.description:
Mine's the black one
Chuwu chuwu
When they built a tramline in my city, they found both an Iron Age Village and one of the cable hauling wheels from the past cablehauled system.
Rishi Sunak going out there making policies that will fuck over people who can't even vote yet.
owo
Love how they made references to an Epic Pony War in the Distant future, then HAD an epic pony war in a later season.
should.
This is why your car is breaking down: Kobolds.
Uma musume Pretty Derby is a wild fucking anime.
Listen, I do keep saying, if Jesus came back and came to America the moment he opened his mouth he would be shot for being a "communist" and then a new religion would spring up with a Glock as it's symbol.
I see this shit and I go "yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes give me the fallout linux computer".
again this makes my brain do smiley emote.
o-o
a baby
Yeah that's pretty fucking epic.
I kinda want this as a wallpaper
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also STREAM: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii

item.description: Browsing my phone, tried calling my friends but they are all asleep. I am desperate for a hug. I just want to be happy. I don't want to be like this.

item.title: Finally found a job
item.description: It's a contract position, but it is within my field of knowledge and not much of a pay cut from my old job. Let's see if it is a good fit, but for now, its time to learn an grow in a new job.

item.title: Ectrodactyly
item.description: Alyssa Cleland was born in a small Ukrainian town and abandoned by her biological parents at a very young age due to her condition. She also has only one leg with another bionic one.
